ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KUKUA, DORIS Y.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT KUKUA, DORIS Y.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW, WILLIE L. TRUSTEE UDT 05-03-91 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-28-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-04-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. PRO TEM JUDGE STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD PRESIDING. JOHN LEWIS, REPORTER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT 1437 CLEMENT STREET AND A MONEY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT DORIS Y. KUKUA FOR $4,312.64 PRINCIPAL AND $110.00 COST. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEY FEES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUKUA, DORIS Y. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1437 CLEMENT STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $4,312.64 RENT, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,422.64, STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW, WILLIE L. TRUSTEE UDT 05-03-91 AS TO DEFENDANT KUKUA, DORIS Y. SUMMONS ISSUED
